languages.original_text: "The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

languages.text: "Механизмы могут быть очищены и вновь введены в эксплуатацию, но потери среди служителей Культа Механикус невосполнимы. Я скорблю, но не о машинах, а о разумах, исполненных знания, что погибли вотще".

"The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."
languages.original_text: "Механизмы могут быть очищены и вновь введены в эксплуатацию, но потери среди служителей Культа Механикус невосполнимы. Я скорблю, но не о машинах, а о разумах, исполненных знания, что погибли вотще".

traits.locale_text: "The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

"The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

"The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

languages.text: «Las máquinas pueden purificarse y reutilizarse, pero las pérdidas entre los sirvientes del Culto Mechanicus son irrecuperables. Me lamento no por las máquinas, sino por las mentes sabias que han fallecido».
languages.original_text: "The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

traits.locale_text: «Las máquinas pueden purificarse y reutilizarse, pero las pérdidas entre los sirvientes del Culto Mechanicus son irrecuperables. Me lamento no por las máquinas, sino por las mentes sabias que han fallecido».

languages.text: 「機械は浄化し、再就役させることができます。しかし、機械教の僕たちの損失は、取り返しがつきません。私が嘆いているのは、機械のためではなく、失われた博識なる精神のためなのです」
languages.original_text: "The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

traits.locale_text: 「機械は浄化し、再就役させることができます。しかし、機械教の僕たちの損失は、取り返しがつきません。私が嘆いているのは、機械のためではなく、失われた博識なる精神のためなのです」

languages.text: “机器经净化后可以重新启用，但机械修会成员的损失却无可挽回。我哀悼，不是为了机器，而是为了那些已经逝去、满载知识的心智。”
languages.original_text: "The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

traits.locale_text: “机器经净化后可以重新启用，但机械修会成员的损失却无可挽回。我哀悼，不是为了机器，而是为了那些已经逝去、满载知识的心智。”

languages.text: "Die Maschinen können gereinigt und wieder in Betrieb genommen werden, aber die Verluste unter den Dienern des Kult Mechanicus sind unwiderruflich. Ich trauere nicht um die Maschinen, sondern um die klugen Köpfe, die ihr Leben ließen."
languages.original_text: "The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

traits.locale_text: "Die Maschinen können gereinigt und wieder in Betrieb genommen werden, aber die Verluste unter den Dienern des Kult Mechanicus sind unwiderruflich. Ich trauere nicht um die Maschinen, sondern um die klugen Köpfe, die ihr Leben ließen."

languages.text: Les machines peuvent être purifiées et fabriquées, mais les pertes parmi les serviteurs du Culte Mechanicus sont définitives. Je ne pleure pas les machines, mais les esprits érudits qui ont péri. »
languages.original_text: "The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

traits.locale_text: Les machines peuvent être purifiées et fabriquées, mais les pertes parmi les serviteurs du Culte Mechanicus sont définitives. Je ne pleure pas les machines, mais les esprits érudits qui ont péri. »

languages.text: "Makineler arındırılıp yeniden hizmete sokulabilir ancak Cult Mechanicus hizmetkârları arasındaki kayıplar telafi edilemez. Makineler için değil, yok olan irfanlı zihinler için kederleniyorum."
languages.original_text: "The machines can be purified and recommissioned, but the losses among the servants of the Cult Mechanicus are irrecoverable. I grieve, not for the machines, but for the knowledgeable minds that have perished."

traits.locale_text: "Makineler arındırılıp yeniden hizmete sokulabilir ancak Cult Mechanicus hizmetkârları arasındaki kayıplar telafi edilemez. Makineler için değil, yok olan irfanlı zihinler için kederleniyorum."
